title: Unsettling Lamp
description: Each combat, the first time you play a card that [gold]Debuffs[/gold] an enemy, double its effect.
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Once a debuff card triggers this effect, only that specific card's debuffs are doubled. After the card is played, the relic becomes inactive for the rest of combat.
